conflict: Without salary or legal cover, the Blue Hour crew must keep people repaired while turning scattered memory fragments into something durable enough to survive seizure and disbelief.
consequence: The mission shifts from exposing corporate wrongdoing to building a registry of stolen selves and nonconsenting donors.
must_land_beats: Show the desk operating as work rather than montage.
Make handwritten documentation a meaningful tactical choice.
Reveal at least one living donor whose scan was reused without real consent.
End with the registry becoming the group's central artifact.
pressure_source: Without salary or legal cover, the Blue Hour crew must keep people repaired while turning scattered memory fragments into something durable enough to survive seizure and disbelief.
state_shift: The mission shifts from exposing corporate wrongdoing to building a registry of stolen selves and nonconsenting donors.
